finding.example_en: Students finding new skills every day at school.
finding.example_zh: 学生每天在学校都会发现新技能。

helpful.meaning_zh: 提供帮助或发挥有用的作用
helpful.example_en: It is helpful to review words every morning.
helpful.example_zh: 每天早上复习单词很有帮助。

mountain.meaning_zh: 远远高于周围环境的陆地；比一座小山还高
mountain.example_en: Every student should know the meaning of mountain.
mountain.example_zh: 每个学生都应该知道山的含义。

neighbour.meaning_zh: 住在（或位于）另一个人附近的人
neighbour.example_en: Every student should know the meaning of neighbour.
neighbour.example_zh: 每个学生都应该知道邻居的含义。

nervously.example_en: She answered nervously and got full marks.
nervously.example_zh: 她回答得紧张，得了满分。

provide.meaning_zh: 给予一些有用或必要的东西
provide.example_en: You should provide carefully in the exam.
provide.example_zh: 你应该在考试中仔细提供。

psychological.meaning_zh: 本质上是精神或情感上的，而不是身体上的
psychological.example_en: Remember to use psychological in your writing.
psychological.example_zh: 记住在写作中使用心理学。

shortage.meaning_zh: 低于预期或要求的金额的属性
shortage.example_en: We talked about the shortage during our English class.
shortage.example_zh: 我们在英语课上谈到了短缺问题。

specialist.meaning_zh: 致力于某一职业或某一学科领域的专家
specialist.example_en: We talked about the specialist during our English class.
specialist.example_zh: 我们在英语课上谈论了专家。

stimulate.example_en: They stimulate together to finish the project.
stimulate.example_zh: 他们共同激励完成该项目。

suddenly.example_en: It is suddenly to review words every morning.
suddenly.example_zh: 突然每天早上都要复习单词。

unavoidable.example_en: It is unavoidable to review words every morning.
unavoidable.example_zh: 每天早上复习单词是不可避免的。

unbag.example_en: She answered unbag and got full marks.

zongzi.example_en: She answered zongzi and got full marks.
